Sources.Title: Johnny Adams — Aging Intervention Program, personal biomarker table
Aging Intervention Foundation — contact Johnny Adams

TranscriptionNotes: The Aging Intervention Foundation identifies Johnny Adams as its CEO and executive director; he presents the program document as his own self-directed age-management work.
The program's phenotypic-age table publishes all nine inputs together for 30 March 2021 and separately prints chronological age 71.29 for that record.

The compact table does not repeat unit labels. Interpreting its inputs in the standard units required by the linked Levine PhenoAge calculation reproduces the source's printed phenotypic age of 58.61 years (58.617 before rounding).
AgeYears preserves the chronological age printed in the source rather than inferring or republishing a date of birth.
Albumin was converted from g/dL to g/L by multiplying by 10.
Creatinine was converted from mg/dL to µmol/L by multiplying by 88.4.
Glucose was converted from mg/dL to mmol/L by multiplying by 0.0555.
